The Proposal: -
The Hon'ble Chief Minister celebrated the 20th birth centenary year of Mahatma Jotirao Phule in the year 2027
This has been announced in the 2026 budget session. As of the year 2027
For the initiative to be implemented to celebrate the 20th birth centenary year of Mahatma Jotirao Phule in

was under consideration.
The Government's Decisions:
Year-long celebrations to mark the centenary year of Mahatma Jotirao Phule in 2027
For the implementation of the initiative. Consolidated by Government Decision dated 10.03.2026
On the lines of the committee, the following sub-committees are being constituted.

para_trans: Government Decision No: Centenary-2026 / Q. 09 / Coordination-2
The committee was headed by Mahatma Jotirao Phule from 11 April 2026 to 11 April 2027.
During this period, the state government should organize the birth centenary year celebrations.
Define the schedule of events.
